stemHtml: A pilot is instructed to leave a holding pattern. When clearance is received specifying the time of departure from the holding point...

options.a: the pilot should adjust the pattern within the limits of the established holding procedure in order to leave the holding point at the time specified, +/- 1 minute.
options.b: the pilot should adjust the pattern within the limits of the established holding procedure in order to leave the holding point at the time specified.
options.c: the pilot should adjust the pattern within the limits of the established holding procedure in order to leave the holding point at or up to 3 minutes after the time specified.
options.d: the pilot should adjust the pattern within the limits of the established holding procedure in order to leave the holding point before or at the time specified.
